docket_entries.description: SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR [DAN MCDOWELL APPEARING ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT - AIRBNB,INC.] FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-18-2023 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO SEP-19-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF VICTOR KAMINOFF IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DAN MCDOWELL (REPRESENTATIVE) VIA ZOOM. PLAINTIFF CONTACTED THE COURT BY PHONE PRIOR TO THE HEARING TO INFORM HE IS UNABLE TO ATTEND TODAY'S HEARING DUE TO MEDICAL EMERGENCY AND REQUESTS FOR POSTPONEMENT. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF VISTOR KAMINOFF IS NOT PRESENT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB INC REPRESENTED BY DAN MCDOWELL, LEGAL INVESTIGATIONS ASSOCATE. JUDGE SYLVIA L. HUSING; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
